parents.subject: LU-17240 tests: remove unnecessary sleep in setupall

commit.subject: LU-10482 tests: renumber sanity/56ca to avoid conflict
commit.message:
LU-10482 tests: renumber sanity/56ca to avoid conflict

There are two sanity test_56ca() tests.  Rename second to test_56Ca().
Rename test_56c*() and test_56d*() tests to avoid future conflicts.

There are similar test_56a*(), test_56b*() and test_56e*() that should
also be fixed, but will be changed separately to avoid too many
review-subtest-change sessions running on a single patch.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Fixes: 8cb2398056 ("LU-10482 flr: enhance 'lfs find' to add mirror options")
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Change-Id: I9f08e48c5b735498afa53b1a36202a9ce8d52c6c
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/65036
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Akash B <akash-b@hpe.com>
Reviewed-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
